message:
🐛 Fix analytics-collect 502: handle GA4 204 null-body status (#1283)

Google Analytics returns 204 No Content for /g/collect. The Web API
Response constructor rejects non-null body with 204/304 status codes.
Use null body for these null-body statuses.

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
